exact_quote: Least Difficult: Peanut Rope Tow, Bunny Hill, Double Z, Loup, Jr. Poma, Ridge | Intermediate: Stairway | Difficult: Terminator, Raceface, Exterminator, Park, Volunteer, Bulldog, Hugh's
notes: Official site lists trails grouped by difficulty (Least Difficult / Intermediate / Difficult). Counts: 6 easy + 1 intermediate + 7 difficult = 14 total. Percentages computed from explicit counts (6/14=43%, 1/14=7%, 7/14=50%). No expert/double-black tier published.
